## Checklist

- [ ] Builds with **zero compiler warnings**
- [ ] `xcodebuild test` passes (CI will verify)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Documentation updated if this changes behavior or architecture
- [ ] No new dependencies (discussed in an issue first if unavoidable)
- [ ] Nothing logs, stores, or transmits user content beyond the configured provider call
